sglang.title: [model-gateway] Implement Zero-Copy Vision Tensor Access
sglang.author: ppraneth
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Vision model tensors (e.g., for LLaVA or Qwen-VL) are large, often several megabytes in size. In the previous implementation, the pixel_values_flat method in image_processor.rs performed a linear-time deep copy of the entire vision tensor into a new heap-allocated Vec on every call. For a
